The '''Freedom Three''' was a model of [[Heavy blaster rifle/Legends|heavy blaster rifle]] manufactured by [[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub Corporation]]. The Stormtrooper Three was issued to [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Desert stormtrooper/Legends|desert stormtroopers]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Originally designated as the '''Stormtrooper Three''',<ref name="ROE" /> the weapons were later rebranded by SoroSuub.<ref name="SR">''[[Strongholds of Resistance]]''</ref>
